query: SELECT c.name, c.sector, c.supplierCosts, scr.expectedAnnualLoss, scr.sectorCode FROM companies c LEFT JOIN supplyChainRisks scr ON c.id = scr.companyId WHERE c.name LIKE '%S&P GLOBAL%'
